title: Baby Gronk
description: Turns every baby zombies into Baby Gronk and adds custom death messages.
body:
Only tested on 1.20 - If you test it on other versions lemme know so I can add them!

All this does is rename every baby zombie to "Baby Gronk" and if you get killed by Baby Gronk it has some custom messages. If you have any ideas for more messages I can add, you can let me know on GitHub issues and I'll add them!

**THIS PLUGIN DEPENDS ON [PLACEHOLDERAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)**
